pi_items.source: Verified against task description which explicitly instructs to create a New Group named 'Facility Costs'.
Verified against task description which explicitly instructs to create an account named 'Warehouse Rent'.
Verified against task description which explicitly instructs to create an account named 'Shop Electricity'.
Verified against task description which explicitly instructs to place the group under the 'Expenses' section.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly state the parameters to be configured in Manager.io's Chart of Accounts: creating a 'Facility Costs' group under the 'Expenses' section, and creating 'Warehouse Rent' and 'Shop Electricity' accounts under that group.
